name: Beta-Glucan
description: A polysaccharide derived from oats or mushrooms, 20% more hydrating than hyaluronic acid.
scientificSummary: Forms a thin film over the skin locking in moisture, while triggering immune cells to repair tissue.
mechanismOfAction: Forms a thin film over the skin locking in moisture, while triggering immune cells to repair tissue.

seo.title: Beta-Glucan - Clinical Profile & Compatibility | Dew Theory
seo.description: Discover the scientific benefits, compatibility, and clinical profile of Beta-Glucan in skincare.
